description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Start a nomination in the mid-rise residential awards category for a 2023 project with a budget between $5M and $10M, and complete all key project fields for that single project.

expected_values.projectOverview: Mid-rise residential development completed in 2023 in Chicago.

tasks.instruction: Register a new user account as a property developer representing a medium-size company (51–200 employees) and complete all mandatory profile fields without using email verification.

tasks.instruction: In the archive of 2022 European mixed-use development winners, select the two projects with the highest innovation scores and open a side-by-side comparison view.

tasks.instruction: For the 2026 Chicago awards gala, select the cheapest early-bird ticket option that includes a seated dinner and costs under $350 per ticket, purchase 3 tickets with vegetarian meals, and proceed to the order review using a pay-by-invoice option.

target_names: Early Bird Gala Ticket - Seated Dinner

tasks.instruction: As a judge, from 2024 Asia Pacific nominations in the Sustainable Development category with sustainability scores of at least 80, add the 5 highest-scoring entries to your shortlist and then view your shortlist.

tasks.instruction: On Day 1 of the conference, add 4 sessions that mention “sustainability” in their titles or descriptions to your personal schedule, ensuring no two selected sessions share the same start time, then open your schedule.

target_names: Opening Plenary: Sustainability Trends in Global Property Development
Designing for Urban Sustainability in Mixed-use Districts
Financing Sustainability: Green Loans and Transition Bonds

tasks.instruction: From the list of sponsorship options, choose the cheapest package priced under $10,000 that includes a logo on the awards website and 2 gala tickets, then submit a sponsorship enquiry for that package for the 2026 awards cycle.

tasks.instruction: In the 2024 People’s Choice public vote, filter to residential finalists, sort them by estimated carbon footprint from lowest to highest, and cast your vote for the finalist with the lowest footprint.

tasks.instruction: In the partner directory, filter for North American sustainability consulting firms with ratings of at least 4 stars, add the first 3 results to your favorites, and then open your favorites list.
